communicative_purpose: To refer to the hotel front desk or reception area
variations: la réception, le comptoir, le desk, le lobby
common_mistakes: English 'reception' used in French; 'accueil' is also common
example_1: Je me suis enregistré à la réception de l'hôtel.
example_3: Appelez la réception si vous avez besoin de quoi que ce soit.
example_1_translation: I checked in at the hotel reception.
example_2_translation: The reception is open 24 hours a day.
example_3_translation: Call reception if you need anything.

communicative_purpose: To specify a room with a double bed for two people
variations: la chambre double, la chambre pour deux, la chambre couple
common_mistakes: Confusing with 'chambre twin' (two separate beds); double is one bed
example_1: J'ai réservé une chambre double pour le weekend.
example_2: La chambre double avec vue sur la mer coûte 150 euros la nuit.
example_3: Je préfère une chambre double plutôt que deux chambres simples.
example_1_translation: I booked a double room for the weekend.
example_2_translation: The double room with sea view costs 150 euros per night.
example_3_translation: I prefer a double room rather than two single rooms.

communicative_purpose: To refer to the key for accessing a hotel room
variations: la clé, la carte magnétique, le badge, le code
common_mistakes: Many hotels now use key cards instead of physical keys
example_1: Voici la clé de votre chambre, c'est la 305 au troisième étage.
example_2: La clé de la chambre ne marche plus, elle est démagnétisée.
example_3: Vous devez retourner la clé à la réception avant le départ.
example_1_translation: Here is your room key, it's 305 on the third floor.
example_2_translation: The room key no longer works, it is demagnetized.
example_3_translation: You must return the key to reception before departure.

communicative_purpose: To refer to the hotel bill or invoice at checkout
variations: l'addition, la facture, le compte, le reçu
common_mistakes: 'Note' is hotel bill; 'addition' is restaurant bill; both mean bill
example_1: Vous pouvez régler la note à la réception.
example_2: La note inclut le petit-déjeuner et le parking.
example_3: Je voudrais la note détaillée s'il vous plaît.
example_1_translation: You can pay the bill at reception.
example_2_translation: The bill includes breakfast and parking.
example_3_translation: I would like the detailed note please.

communicative_purpose: To indicate that breakfast is included in the room rate
variations: le breakfast inclus, repas inclus, petit-déjeuner compris
common_mistakes: Not all hotels include breakfast; always check booking details
example_1: Le petit-déjeuner est inclus dans le prix de la chambre.
example_2: Notre formule inclut le petit-déjeuner buffet de 7h à 10h.
example_3: Si vous voulez le petit-déjeuner, c'est 15 euros supplémentaires.
example_1_translation: Breakfast is included in the room price.
example_2_translation: Our package includes buffet breakfast from 7 a.m. to 10 a.m.
example_3_translation: If you want breakfast it's 15 euros extra.

communicative_purpose: To indicate that a hotel booking has been confirmed
variations: c'est confirmé, réservation garantie, votre réservation
common_mistakes: Always keep booking confirmation number for reference
example_1: Votre réservation est confirmée pour le 15 mars au 18.
example_2: J'ai reçu un email confirmant ma réservation d'hôtel.
example_3: Sans numéro de confirmation, on ne peut pas garantir la chambre.
example_1_translation: Your reservation is confirmed for March 15 to 18.
example_2_translation: I received an email confirming my hotel reservation.
example_3_translation: Without a confirmation number, we cannot guarantee the room.

communicative_purpose: To indicate that a hotel room is prepared and available
variations: la chambre est disponible, la chambre est libre, c'est prêt
common_mistakes: Checking in before standard time may require waiting
example_1: Votre chambre est prête, elle a été nettoyée ce matin.
example_2: La chambre n'est pas encore prête, revenez dans une heure.
example_3: En basse saison, la chambre est prête dès le matin.
example_1_translation: Your room is ready, it was cleaned this morning.
example_2_translation: The room is not ready yet, come back in an hour.
example_3_translation: In low season, the room is ready in the morning.

meaning: the elevator is out of order
communicative_purpose: To indicate the elevator is not functioning
trigger_situations: Building access, technical problems, stairs required
variations: l'ascenseur ne marche pas, le lift est HS, escalier
common_mistakes: 'HS' (hors service) is common slang for broken
example_1: L'ascenseur est en panne, il faut prendre l'escalier.
example_2: L'ascenseur est en panne depuis hier, la réparation takes du temps.
example_3: On vous donne une chambre au rez-de-chaussée à cause de la panne.
example_1_translation: The elevator is broken, you have to take the stairs.
example_2_translation: The elevator has been broken since yesterday, the repair takes time.
example_3_translation: You are given a room on the ground floor because of the breakdown.

communicative_purpose: To describe a room with a view of the ocean or sea
variations: vue mer, vue sur l'océan, vue panoramique, vue lac
common_mistakes: Sea view rooms cost more; 'vue colline' means hill view
example_1: La chambre avec vue sur la mer coûte 30 euros de plus par nuit.
example_2: On a demandé une chambre avec vue sur la mer si possible.
example_3: La vue sur la mer depuis notre balcon était magnifique.
example_1_translation: The sea view room costs 30 euros more per night.
example_2_translation: We asked for a room with a sea view if possible.
example_3_translation: The sea view from our balcony was magnificent.

communicative_purpose: To refer to service delivered to hotel rooms
trigger_situations: Food orders, hotel services, in-room dining
variations: le service en chambre, la livraison, le service chambre
common_mistakes: English 'room service' commonly used in French
example_1: On peut commander le petit-déjeuner par room service.
example_2: Le room service est disponible 24 heures sur 24.
example_3: J'ai commandé un café et des croissants par room service.
example_1_translation: You can order breakfast via room service.
example_2_translation: Room service is available 24 hours a day.
example_3_translation: I ordered a coffee and croissants through room service.

communicative_purpose: To refer to the cooling system in a room or building
variations: l'air conditionné, le chauffage, le climatiseur, la clim
common_mistakes: 'Climatisation' is AC; 'chauffage' is heating; opposite functions
example_1: La climatisation ne marche pas dans ma chambre, il fait très chaud.
example_2: Je n'arrive pas à régler la climatisation, elle fait trop froid.
example_3: En été, la climatisation est essentielle dans les hôtels français.
example_1_translation: The air conditioning does not work in my room, it is very hot.
example_2_translation: I can't adjust the air conditioning, it's too cold.
example_3_translation: In summer, air conditioning is essential in French hotels.

communicative_purpose: To refer to leaving the hotel and settling payment
variations: partir, libérer la chambre, departure, check-out à midi
common_mistakes: English 'checkout' commonly used; standard time is usually 11h or midi
example_1: Le check-out est à 11h maximum, on doit libérer la chambre.
example_2: On peut faire un late check-out jusqu'à 14h avec supplément.
example_3: Je suis parti ce matin après le check-out à la réception.
example_1_translation: Check-out is at 11 a.m. maximum, we must vacate the room.
example_2_translation: You can do a late check-out until 2 p.m. at an additional cost.
example_3_translation: I left this morning after checking out at reception.

communicative_purpose: To refer to booking made through the internet
trigger_situations: Internet bookings, website reservations, online travel
variations: la réservation sur internet, booking en ligne, commander en ligne
common_mistakes: Many sites have English domains even for French hotels
example_1: J'ai fait ma réservation en ligne sur Booking.com.
example_2: La réservation en ligne est souvent moins chère qu'à l'arrivée.
example_3: Il faut imprimer la confirmation de la réservation en ligne.
example_1_translation: I made my reservation online at Booking.com.
example_2_translation: Booking online is often cheaper than on arrival.
example_3_translation: You must print the online reservation confirmation.

communicative_purpose: To indicate that a guest has left the hotel
variations: le client est parti, le client a quitté, départ du client
common_mistakes: 'Faire valiser' is specifically about checking out; 'valiser' is luggage
example_1: Le client a fait valiser à 10h, la chambre est libre.
example_2: Le client a fait valiser sans payer la note, problème.
example_3: On peut nettoyer la chambre, le client a fait valiser.
example_1_translation: The customer packed up at 10 a.m., the room is free.
example_2_translation: The customer packed up without paying the bill, problem.
example_3_translation: We can clean the room, the guest has packed up.

communicative_purpose: To refer to a hotel rate that includes breakfast and one other meal
trigger_situations: Hotel booking, meal plans, dining options
variations: la pension complète, le bed and breakfast, repas inclus
common_mistakes: Half board = breakfast + dinner; full board = all meals
example_1: On a choisi la formule demi-pension, petit-déjeuner et dîner inclus.
example_2: La demi-pension est intéressante si on veut manger à l'hôtel le soir.
example_3: En demi-pension, on peut déjeuner dehors si on veut.
example_1_translation: We chose the half-board option, breakfast and dinner included.
example_2_translation: Half board is interesting if you want to eat at the hotel in the evening.
example_3_translation: With half board, you can have lunch outside if you want.
